title: Apple to skip high-end M6 Mac chips in favor of AI-focused M7 line
author: scrlk
raw_description: Giftlink: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-25/apple-to-... also https://www.msn.com/en-ca/lifestyle/shopping/apple-to-skip-h... Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48676795 Points: 271 # Comments: 267
summary: 苹果计划跳过高端M6 Mac芯片，转而开发专注于AI的M7系列，包括M7 Pro、M7 Max和M7 Ultra，以强化AI计算能力。
analysis_note: 与AI硬件相关，但非技术突破，偏向商业策略，评分中等。
